pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify this output path.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to set the dampingConstant to 50.0, and the verifier checks for this value.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to set the maxForce to 500.0, and the verifier checks for this value.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to set the TouchSensor type to 'force', and the verifier checks for this value.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to change the resolution to 0.1, and the verifier checks for this value.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_assembly_force_sensor task. Verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world created via setup_task.sh. Confirmed that the target output path ('/home/ga/Desktop/assembly_press_configured.wbt') and expected configured component values (dampingConstant 50.0, maxForce 500.0, type 'force', and resolution 0.1) exactly match the explicit instructions in the prompt and the grading logic in verifier.py.
